metadata.task_name: post-release-dashboard 30-day schedule conclusion aggregation and skill feedback
metadata.docs_only_rationale: Issue #497 runtime deliverables are limited to future gh run aggregation, skill references markdown additions, and changelog line. The 2026-05-06 review cycle also hardens parent Issue #351 automation (redaction-check.md artifact and CI script test) without changing Issue #497 runtime state. Failure-rate-driven retry/alert remains out-of-scope and would be raised as a separate unassigned task after the 30 day gate.
metadata.trigger_condition: main merge of issue-351 + 30 days elapsed; oldest gh run createdAt <= today - 30 days

phases.name: 設計（集計手順 / redaction / references 追記構造）
DRY 化 / 仕様間整合
最終レビューゲート（30日 gate 含む）
手動検証（NON_VISUAL 縮約 / 30日 gh run 集計実行）

ac: AC-1: gh run list が 30 日以上の連続期間をカバー
AC-2: conclusion 分布表が deployment-gha.md に追記
AC-3: failure root cause 分類表が deployment-gha.md に追記
AC-4: 連続 failure 区間の最大日数を記録
AC-5: failure 比率に応じた次アクション判断と起票 issue 番号記録
AC-6: changelog/20260506-issue497-30day-feedback.md に 30 日 feedback 反映行追加
AC-7: raw JSON を outputs/phase-11/post-release-dashboard-30d.json に保存
AC-8: failure log redaction grep 実施で機微情報混入ゼロ
AC-9: GitHub Issue #497 は CLOSED 据え置き
AC-10: 4 条件評価が全 PASS
AC-11: Phase 12 で 7 必須成果物 + aiworkflow-requirements 同期完了
